ddt:Target.Name: UPATransversal V2.0_valeo
ddt:Target.Description:
UPA Transversal Version 1.9
Supplier : Valeo
PDE UPA : Jean-Marie Larreur
Author : C. CANDAS Sce 65608
-2/11/2010 : correction (VDiag $55, Bad length DID $200B, $2030, Bad data format : vehicle_speed, add request 211F 3B1F, Add Start/Stop routine)
-02/2/2011 Add screen
-07/3/2011 Add global conf - compatible with TradConf
-05/05/2011 Add screen with basic configuration
-05/09/2011 Improve screen, Update auto-ident and projects, Correct mistakes
-27/09/2011 Add screen, apply correction for ODX
-13/10/2011 Identification.Daimler, Add screen
-14/03/2012 Add screen to configure buzzer, Correction for ODX
-30/05/2012 Add screen to configure general UPA parameters
-18/12/2012 Correct offset Unit

Item.Text: FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
Device and failure type ODB codding
FM (Frequency Modulated) / PWM (Pulse Width Modulated) Failures
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level out of range / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect
Component or system operation obstructed or blocked

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: VehicleSpeed
Data.Comment: Copy of the vehicle read on CAN

Data.Name: cfg.RearDetectionState
Data.Comment: Rear detection state, change parameter when Switch push, User preference menu or Diag tool.

Data.Name: cfg.FrontDetectionState
Data.Comment: Front detection state, change parameter when Switch push, User preference menu or Diag tool.

Item.Text: LED is light when UPA is OFF
LED is light when UPA is ON
Only once in Power ON cycle

Data.Name: Sound.ObstacleDiscontiniousFrequency
Data.Description:
Frequency is link to de distance of obstacle.

The UPA compute frequency according to max distance of detection.

1Hz = obstacle far

10Hz = obstacle near

Data.Name: gcfg.RearDetectionState
Data.Comment: Rear detection state, change parameter when Switch push, User preference menu or Diag tool.

Data.Name: gcfg.FrontDetectionState
Data.Comment: Front detection state, change parameter when Switch push, User preference menu or Diag tool.

Item.Text: LED is light when UPA is OFF
LED is light when UPA is ON
Only once in Power ON cycle

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: DataRead.Tracabilite_EOLT
Request.Comment: Valeo Tracability 1

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

Request.Name: DataRead.Tracabilite_ICT
Request.Comment: Valeo Tracability 2

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.ExtendedDiagnostic
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: StartDiagnosticSession.Default
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic screen

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: DataRead.RearDistancesMeasurement
Request.Comment: Distance mesurée par chaque capteur et Distance calculée

Request.Name: Output Control
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: Output Control.Stop
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: Output Control.Start.Display
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: Output Control.Start.Sound
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: Output Control.Status
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.Nissan
Request.Comment: ID

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.Daimler
Request.Comment: Daimler specific request

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.Nissan.AfterConfiguration
Request.Comment: Nissan use only

Request.Name: DataWrite.Identification.Nissan.AfterConfiguration
Request.Comment: Nissan use only

Request.Name: StartRoutine
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import (Conditional)

Request.Name: StopRoutine
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import (Conditional)

Request.Name: DataRead.gcfg
Request.Comment: Used by auto-config

Request.Name: DataWrite.gcfg
Request.Comment: Used by auto-config

Request.Name: Output Control.Start.FrontDistances
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Request.Name: Output Control.Start.RearDistances
Request.Comment: Standard definition for DDT2000 automatic testing screen

Label.Text: Trailer - available if SwitchMode = No Switch
System type - for rear only UPA, set FrontDetectionState = Off, FrontSensors=unavailable
Sound configuration - if vehicle is without buzzer, set UseBuzzer = No
Sound configuration - if vehicle is without buzzer, set UseBuzzer = No
Vehicle Shape Type - free data only for documentation
Configuration Flag - Activate or not specials features
Speed threshold - deactivate UPA over a speed and reactivate under a speed (default 10/12)
Filtering of the reverse gear signal
Timeout to stop discontinuous beep when the vehicle doesn't move
Warning - Activation threshold must be 2km/h lower than deactivation
No effet for manual gear box
